sentence: Mi ta papia papiamentu na kas.
ipa: mi ta papia papiamentu na kaʃ
notes: Imperfective marker 'ta' per kouwenberg_murray1994; Curaçao phonemic spelling per fpi2009.

sentence: E mucha ta hunga den kaya.
ipa: e mutʃa ta huŋa den kaja
gloss_en: The child plays in the street.
notes: Singular article 'e'; ⟨h⟩=[h] 'hunga'; coda-/s/ absent per kouwenberg_murray1994.

sentence: Nos tur ta bai skol mañan.
ipa: noʃ tur ta baj ʃkoɫ maɲan
gloss_en: We all go to school tomorrow.
notes: Coda-/s/ palatalisation ⟨s⟩>[ʃ] in 'nos','skol' per kouwenberg_murray1994; spelling per fpi2009.
Negation 'no'; ⟨k⟩ not ⟨c⟩ phonemic spelling per fpi2009.

sentence: Bo ke un kòpi di kòfi?
ipa: bo ke un kɔpi di kɔfi
gloss_en: Do you want a cup of coffee?
notes: Grave ⟨ò⟩=[ɔ] open-mid vowel per kouwenberg_murray1994; diacritic per fpi2009.
Plural pronoun 'nan'; ⟨h⟩=[h] 'traha' (from Sp. trabajar) per maurer1998.
⟨h⟩=[h] 'muhé' (from Sp. mujer); acute-stress vowel per romer1991.

gloss_en: The book is on the table.
notes: Trill ⟨r⟩=[r] word-medial 'riba'; Portuguese-origin lexicon per maurer1998.
Imperative bare root 'bini'; acute-stress 'akí' per romer1991.

gloss_en: They do not want to go today.
